form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at this track on March 26 over 1900m, 23 len behind Secret Lion with 58kg at $10.85. The start before that ran last of 8 at this track on January 29 over 1400m, 25 len behind Mogol carrying 58kg at $8.55. Working up to a win. Worth following.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 9 at this track on March 29 over 1200m, 27 len behind Mufasa with 54kg at $37.85. The start before that ran last in a small field at this track on March 20 over 2000m, 61 len behind Brave Orphan carrying 50kg at $21.35. Will jump at pretty long odds and deservedly so.
